sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12315" key="a)pobroxismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποβροχ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n12315.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making a ligature,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:24:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.24.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
